creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
FAILED: CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/codec_svt.c.o
/ccache/libexec/ccache/cc -DAVIF_BUILDING_SHARED_LIBS -DAVIF_CODEC_AOM=1 -DAVIF_CODEC_AOM_DECODE=1 -DAVIF_CODEC_AOM_ENCODE=1 -DAVIF_CODEC_DAV1D=1 -DAVIF_CODEC_SVT=1
 -DAVIF_DLL -Davif_EXPORTS -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/libavif/work/libavif-0.9.3/include -I/usr/local/include -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-ali
asing -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing -fPIC -fvisibility=hidden   -Weverything -Wno-bad-function-cast -Wno-cast-align -Wno-conversion -Wno-
covered-switch-default -Wno-disabled-macro-expansion -Wno-documentation -Wno-documentation-unknown-command -Wno-double-promotion -Wno-float-equal -Wno-missing-noret
urn -Wno-padded -Wno-sign-conversion -Wno-error=c11-extensions -Wno-reserved-identifier -Wno-poison-system-directories -Werror -pthread -std=gnu99 -MD -MT CMakeFile
s/avif.dir/src/codec_svt.c.o -MF CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/codec_svt.c.o.d -o CMakeFiles/avif.dir/src/codec_svt.c.o -c /wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/libavif/work/libavi
f-0.9.3/src/codec_svt.c
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/libavif/work/libavif-0.9.3/src/codec_svt.c:76:6: error: 'SVT_AV1_CHECK_VERSION' is not defined, evaluates to 0 [-Werror,-Wundef]
#if !SVT_AV1_CHECK_VERSION(0, 8, 8)
     ^
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/libavif/work/libavif-0.9.3/src/codec_svt.c:76:27: error: token is not a valid binary operator in a preprocessor subexpression
#if !SVT_AV1_CHECK_VERSION(0, 8, 8)
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/libavif/work/libavif-0.9.3/src/codec_svt.c:90:5: error: 'SVT_AV1_CHECK_VERSION' is not defined, evaluates to 0 [-Werror,-Wundef]
#if SVT_AV1_CHECK_VERSION(0, 8, 8)
    ^
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/libavif/work/libavif-0.9.3/src/codec_svt.c:90:5: error: function-like macro 'SVT_AV1_CHECK_VERSION' is not defined
4 errors generated.

With multimedia/svt-av1 0.9.1.
